query: What is the business activity of company De Duurzame Adviseurs (Use the website https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/ as your starting point)?Please focus on the positioning on the value chain, the product & services and the end-markets served.Please write paragraph-style starting with [company name] is .... Maintain proper hierarchy of information and keep a neutral tone, sticking to facts and avoiding marketing lingo.Answer in English.
answer:
**Executive Summary**

De Duurzame Adviseurs is a professional services firm specializing in sustainability consultancy, compliance reporting, and certification guidance for businesses and government entities [De Duurzame Adviseurs - Advies voor bedrijven en overheden](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/corporate-sustainability-reporting-directive-csrd/). Operating as an external advisory partner, the company helps organizations measure their environmental impact, implement Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) strategies, and meet regulatory or procurement requirements [Werken naar een succesvol, actief ESG-beleid](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-strategie/). 

**Positioning on the Value Chain**

Within the value chain, De Duurzame Adviseurs functions as a B2B (business-to-business) and B2G (business-to-government) service provider. The firm acts as an enabler and compliance partner, assisting organizations in generating the sustainability data required by downstream clients, supplier portals, and public tender processes [ESG framework opzetten voor duidelijke duurzaamheidsinformatie](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-framework/). By providing calculation, reporting, and strategic advisory services, the company helps its clients maintain their own competitive positioning and regulatory compliance within their respective supply chains [ESG wetgeving in Nederland: wat betekent het?](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-wetgeving).

**Products and Services**

The company's service portfolio is divided into four primary categories: carbon management, regulatory reporting, certification guidance, and real estate sustainability. 

*   **Carbon Management:** The firm calculates CO2 footprints for organizations and specific products, which includes identifying emission activities and developing reduction plans [CO2-Footprint opstellen - Advies, Coaching en Ontzorging](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/co2-footprint-opstellen/). This includes specialized advice on Scope 3 emissions data collection and calculation according to GHG Protocol categories, as well as support for the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi) and emission factor analysis [Scope 3 CO2 emissies: Wat valt hier allemaal onder?](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/kennisbank/co2-begrippen/scope-3-co2-emissies-wat-valt-hier-onder/); [Je eigen CO₂-footprint berekenen met deze 6 stappen](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/je-eigen-co2-footprint-berekenen-met-deze-6-stappen/).
*   **Regulatory Reporting and ESG Strategy:** De Duurzame Adviseurs assists with Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) compliance through modular programs like 'CSRD Next' and 'CSRD Kickstart' [De Duurzame Adviseurs - Advies voor bedrijven en overheden](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/corporate-sustainability-reporting-directive-csrd/). For smaller entities, they offer Voluntary Sustainability Reporting Standard for SMEs (VSME) services via a 6-week 'VSME Basis' or an 8-week 'VSME Plus' trajectory [VSME advies voor mkb | VSME Rapportage](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/vsme-rapportage-opstellen). Additionally, the firm develops ESG strategies, governance structures, and online Corporate Social Responsibility (MVO) annual reports [Werken naar een succesvol, actief ESG-beleid](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-strategie/); [Online MVO Verslag | De Duurzame Adviseurs](https://mvo.deduurzameadviseurs.nl/).
*   **Certification Guidance:** The company provides support for obtaining the CO2-Prestatieladder certificate (offering digital certification options and a 100% certificate guarantee), EcoVadis certification, and B Corp certification, the latter supported by a certified B Leader [CO2-Prestatieladder - managementsysteem voor bedrijven en overheden](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/co2-prestatieladder-behalen/); [Digitaal certificeren voor de CO2-Prestatieladder voor klimaatverbetering](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/digitaal-certificeren-co2-prestatieladder/); [B-Corp Certificering](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/b-corp-certificering/); [De Duurzame Adviseurs - Advies voor bedrijven en overheden](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/). They also guide implementations of the Safety Ladder (Veiligheidsladder) through Quick Scans and six work sessions based in Amersfoort [Verhoog het veiligheidsbewustzijn met de veiligheidsladder](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/veiligheidsladder/).
*   **Real Estate and Education:** Real estate services include energy scans, energy label creation, sustainability roadmaps, and a consumption management system with ready-to-use formats [Verduurzaming vastgoed](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/verduurzaming-vastgoed/). Educational offerings include live and recorded webinars, e-books, and the 'Positieve Impact' podcast [De Duurzame Adviseurs - Advies voor bedrijven en overheden](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/).

**End-Markets Served**

De Duurzame Adviseurs serves a diverse range of industries and organizational sizes. The firm has a strong focus on the Construction and Infrastructure sector [ESG criteria: wat moet je écht aantonen als ondernemer?](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-criteria/). Other specific industries served include logistics (evidenced by client CEVA Logistics), food (evidenced by client Hoogesteger), technology, and the manufacturing and industrial sectors [ESG wetgeving in Nederland: wat betekent het?](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-wetgeving). 

In terms of client types, the firm targets non-listed Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs), particularly those acting as suppliers to larger companies that require sustainability data [VSME ESRS: Vrijwillige duurzaamheidsrapportage voor het MKB](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/kennisbank/efrag-begrippen/vsme-esrs/); [ESG framework opzetten voor duidelijke duurzaamheidsinformatie](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-framework/). They also serve organizations participating in public tenders, municipalities, and companies seeking B Corp status [ESG wetgeving in Nederland: wat betekent het?](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-wetgeving); [ESG criteria: wat moet je écht aantonen als ondernemer?](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-criteria/). Documented corporate clients include The Sharing Group and Heutink Groep [ESG wetgeving in Nederland: wat betekent het?](https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/esg-wetgeving).

**Gaps and Limitations**

Based on the provided findings, the following information could not be determined:
*   Financial performance, revenue figures, or pricing structures for their services.
*   The total number of employees, organizational scale, or geographic footprint beyond the mention of work sessions in Amersfoort.
*   The exact market share or competitive positioning relative to other sustainability consultancies in the Netherlands.
